title: Manufacturing Engineer - Tata Steel Digital Technologies - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Tata Steel Digital Technologies - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Tata Steel Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Manufacturing Engineer for our Hyderabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Tata Steel Digital Technologies:
Tata Steel Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Steel Digital Technologies!
